_purpose: Append-only cache of citation verification results. Each line is one JSON object recording a single fetch-and-compare event. Used by the adversarial-reviewer agent to avoid repeatedly re-fetching arXiv / DOI metadata for unchanged bibitems. One line per (bibkey, bibitem_content_hash) pair; most recent wins.

_entry_format.paper: string — paper_key where this bibitem appears (if source is a paper rather than the global registry)
_entry_format.bibitem_hash: string — sha256 of the normalized bibitem text (authors + title + arxiv_id + venue, lowercase, whitespace-collapsed) so we can detect when a bibitem was edited
_entry_format.arxiv_id: string|null — arxiv ID as written in the bibitem
_entry_format.fetched_title: string|null — title returned by arxiv / doi when fetched
_entry_format.fetched_authors: string|null — first-author et al. as returned
_entry_format.verdict: match | wrong_target | wrong_author | wrong_title | wrong_venue | fetch_failed
_entry_format.reviewer: string — who or what produced this record (e.g. adversarial-reviewer / claims-reviewer / human:jroehm)

_staleness_policy: Entries older than 90 days should be re-verified even if bibitem_hash matches (catches cases where a paper is updated on arXiv without title change, or a DOI now resolves to a different record). The adversarial-reviewer is responsible for applying this policy.

fetched_title: An Attempt at Pregeometry: --- Gravity with Composite Metric ---
detail: Verified via OUP academic.oup.com via doi.org redirect. Title minor-corrected from "gauge fields" to "gravity with composite metric" (actual PTP subtitle).

fetched_title: Spinor gravity and diffeomorphism invariance on the lattice
detail: Verified via arxiv.org/abs/1201.2871 (Proceedings of 6th Aegean Summer School, Naxos 2011; published in Springer LNP Vol 863 chapter 4, DOI 10.1007/978-3-642-33036-0_4). Registry arXiv corrected from 1206.3392 (unrelated info-theory paper) to 1201.2871.

Verified via arxiv.org/abs/2101.11519 (journal-ref field reports JHEP06(2022)069, DOI 10.1007/JHEP06(2022)069). Registry arXiv corrected from 2110.13863 (unrelated exoplanet-ephemeris ExoClock II paper by Kokori et al.) to 2101.11519; DOI corrected from JHEP02(2022)169 to JHEP06(2022)069.

fetched_title: Geometry and symmetries in lattice spinor gravity
detail: CORRECTION: prior registry entry cited nonexistent 'Wetterich, PLB 901, 136223 (2024) - Spinor gravity from a fermionic four-vertex'. CrossRef returns 404 for that DOI; INSPIRE/arXiv have no matching paper; Phase-5z deep research never references such a paper. Replaced with the canonical lattice spinor-gravity paper (arXiv:1201.6505 / Ann. Phys. 327, 2184, 2012, DOI 10.1016/j.aop.2012.04.005) which explicitly introduces the nearest-neighbor bond structure formalized in WetterichNJL.lean. Verified via arxiv.org/abs/1201.6505 and INSPIRE literature listing.
Verified via NASA ADS bibcode 1937ZPhy..104..553F. Title, author, journal, volume, page, year all match.

fetched_title: Dynamical Model of Elementary Particles Based on an Analogy with Superconductivity. I
detail: Verified via NASA ADS bibcode 1961PhRv..122..345N. Title, authors, journal, volume, page, year all match.

fetched_title: Renormalization flow towards gravitational catalysis in the 3d Gross-Neveu model
detail: Verified via NASA ADS bibcode 2013PhRvD..87j4026G. Registry arXiv corrected from 1305.6940 (unrelated philosophy-of-physics paper by Mansouri/Golshani/Karbasizadeh) to actual 1303.4253. Bibkey GiesScherer is project-local shorthand; consider rename to GiesLippoldt2013 (advisory).

fetched_title: An introduction to quantum field theory
detail: Partial verification via OpenLibrary search (title and year 1995 match; second-author + ISBN fields not returned by public search API). Routledge/WorldCat direct WebFetch blocked (403). Attribution consistent with community-standard knowledge of the Peskin-Schroeder text; no contradictions. Textbook has no DOI (ISBN-only).
